participants.name: 김영준
participants.professional_persona: 김영준 교수는 서울 소재 명문대학에서 15년간 재료공학을 가르쳐온 연구책임자입니다. BK21 교육연구단을 이끌며 차세대 반도체 소재 인재 양성에 주력하고 있습니다.
participants.skills_and_expertise: 나노소재 합성 및 특성 분석, 반도체 공정 전문성을 보유하였으며, 대형 국가과제 기획 및 수행 경험이 풍부합니다.
participants.career_goals_and_ambitions: 연구단의 중간평가에서 최고 등급을 받아 예산을 증액받고, 궁극적으로 세계적 수준의 재료공학 연구허브로 성장시키는 것이 목표입니다.

participants.name: 충남대학교에서 (nvjf42)
participants.professional_persona: 충남대학교에서 생명과학 석사 과정 중이며, BK21 교육연구단에서 분자생물학을 연구하고 있습니다. 장학금(월 70만 원)은 생활비와 실험 재료 구입에 큰 도움이 됩니다. 학부 때부터 유전자 치료에 관심이 많아 대전 지역 바이오 연구소와 협업을 희망합니다.
participants.skills_and_expertise: 세포 배양과 CRISPR 유전자 가위 기술에 숙련되어 있으며, qPCR과 Western blot 분석을 자체적으로 수행합니다.
participants.career_goals_and_ambitions: 석사 졸업 후 바이오 벤처 기업에서 유전자 치료제 개발 연구원으로 일하는 것이 목표입니다.

participants.skills_and_expertise: 전기화학 분석 및 나노소재 합성에 전문성을 가지고 있으며, 실험 데이터 분석 능력이 뛰어납니다.
participants.career_goals_and_ambitions: 석사 졸업 후 국내 배터리 기업의 연구소에 입사하여 차세대 전지 개발에 기여하는 것이 목표입니다.

participants.name: 고려대학교에서
participants.professional_persona: 고려대학교에서 경제학 박사학위를 받고, 서울 소재 BK21 교육연구팀에서 연구원으로 활동 중입니다. 통화정책이 가계 부채와 주택 가격에 미치는 영향을 미시 데이터로 분석하고 있습니다.
participants.skills_and_expertise: 패널 계량경제학 방법론과 대규모 행정 데이터 처리에 정통하며, 한국은행 및 금융 연구원과의 공동 연구 경험이 있습니다.
participants.career_goals_and_ambitions: 중앙은행이나 국책 연구기관에 입성하여 실물 경제 정책 수립에 기여할 수 있는 실증 연구를 지속하고 싶습니다.

participants.skills_and_expertise: 분자생물학, 단백체학 연구에 강점이 있으며, 대학-기업 간 공동연구를 주선하는 네트워킹 능력이 뛰어납니다.
participants.career_goals_and_ambitions: 교육연구단의 자체역량을 강화하여 향후 재선정 평가에서 안정적으로 지원을 유지하고, 지역 생명과학 산업 발전에 기여하고자 합니다.

initial_posts.narrative: As the head of an education research group at a regional national university, I estimate the total funding allocated to Hanyang University's BK21 program for 2022 based on the policy context. The total support budget for all 577 education research groups is 408,080 million KRW, but the education research group project budget is 355,151 million KRW. Hanyang University, being a major private university with strong engineering and science programs, likely receives a proportionate share. Given that there are 577 groups and the budget is distributed by field and performance, I estimate Hanyang's allocation at around 3-4 billion KRW, but the policy states the total for education research groups is 355,151 million KRW, so I use that as the total for all groups. For Hanyang specifically, I estimate about 3.5 billion KRW based on typical shares. For graduate scholarship slots, the policy states about 12,600 per year in future talent training and 6,400 in innovation talent training, totaling 19,000 slots nationally. Hanyang's share would be proportional to its number of groups. For postdoc positions, the minimum salary is 3 million KRW per month, and with a typical group budget, I estimate about 600 postdoc positions nationally, with Hanyang hosting around 20-30. However, I must ground my estimates in the policy's stated numbers. The policy says 12,600 + 6,400 = 19,000 graduate students per year, so I use that as the total scholarship slots. For postdocs, the policy does not give a direct number, so I estimate based on typical ratios.
evidence: The policy states that participating graduate students number about 12,600 per year in future talent training and about 6,400 per year in innovation talent training, totaling 19,000 slots nationally.
The total education research group project budget is 355,151 million KRW for 577 groups, so Hanyang's share is proportional to its number of groups (likely around 10-15 groups).

Postdoc positions are not explicitly counted in the policy, but with a minimum salary of 3 million KRW per month and typical group budgets, I estimate about 600 postdoc positions nationally based on the ratio of postdoc to graduate student support in similar programs.

The policy's resource logic indicates that graduate innovation support funds are separate (52,896 million KRW) and not included in the education research group budget, so my estimate focuses on the direct research group funding.

initial_posts.narrative: As a master's student at Chungnam National University, I see the activities phase from the ground. The total funds disbursed should match the policy's stated total support budget of 408,080 million KRW for 2022, because the two-installment schedule (70% in March, 30% in September) is a standard disbursement mechanism that will be executed fully. Evaluation panels are convened for annual, mid-term, and compliance purposes; the policy mentions annual evaluation (once per year), mid-term evaluation (once in 2023, but for 2022 activities there is likely a preparatory meeting), and compliance checks (separate panel). I estimate 3 formal panel meetings in 2022: one for annual evaluation, one for mid-term evaluation preparation, and one for compliance check oversight. Consulting sessions are explicitly stated as 280 groups that wished to receive consulting, so I adopt that number. Compliance checks are stated to target 205 innovative talent training groups, so I use that figure. Budget adjustments and reallocations based on evaluation outcomes are handled by the Project Oversight Committee, but that is a downstream activity; at this phase, the focus is on executing the planned activities.

The policy states 205 education research groups are subject to compliance checks on implementation, so compliance_checks_executed is 205.

initial_posts.narrative: As an early-career researcher in an economics-focused BK21 group in Seoul, I reason from the prior phases to estimate long-term impacts. However, given the program's scale relative to the entire national R&D ecosystem, the improvement is modest—from a current rank around 10 to about 8. The systemic changes in research culture (integrity, collaboration, interdisciplinarity) are expected to be positive but slow, as alumni progress in their careers and spread best practices. I estimate 12.5 top 1% cited publications per 1000 researchers nationally, based on the program's output of 38,000 publications from 19,000 graduate students and 600 postdocs, with a small fraction (about 0.5%) becoming high-impact. This is consistent with my social science perspective that publication impact takes time to materialize.

The central tendency and range for both variables are thus identical across all posts.
